name: Swedish Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a pan over medium heat (cast iron or cast aluminum Swedish pan with shallow, round indentations for making thin pancakes about 3 inches in diameter).
2. In a large bowl, beat the egg and stir in milk, salt, flour, baking powder, and sugar until the batter is smooth.
3. Stir in melted butter.
4. Grease the cups in the hot pan with shortening or butter.
5. Spoon 2 rounded tablespoons of batter into each greased cup.
6. Cook about 1 minute on each side or until golden brown.
7. Serve immediately with jam or jelly and sour cream.
8. Makes 20 pancakes.
